evidenceRequirements.title: User Access Export
evidenceRequirements.description: Export of active users and assigned roles from an in-scope system.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export from identity provider or application admin console.

evidenceRequirements.title: Completed User Access Review
evidenceRequirements.description: Documented evidence that user access was reviewed and approved by an authorized reviewer.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload completed review worksheet, ticket, or access review report.

evidenceRequirements.title: Access Review Remediation Records
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that inappropriate access identified during review was removed or corrected.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload remediation tickets or access change logs.

evidenceRequirements.title: Privileged User Export
evidenceRequirements.description: Export of users with administrator, root, owner, or other elevated permissions.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export privileged role assignments from identity provider, cloud provider, or application.

evidenceRequirements.title: Privileged Access Approval Records
evidenceRequirements.description: Approval records showing elevated access was authorized before assignment.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload access request tickets or approval workflow export.

evidenceRequirements.title: MFA Configuration
evidenceRequirements.description: Configuration showing MFA requirements for users, privileged users, and remote access.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Capture identity provider policy configuration or export conditional access settings.

evidenceRequirements.title: MFA Enrollment Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report showing MFA enrollment status for in-scope users.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export MFA enrollment report from identity provider.

evidenceRequirements.title: MFA Exception List
evidenceRequirements.description: List of MFA exceptions with approval, business justification, and expiration date.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload exception register or export from governance workflow.

evidenceRequirements.title: Access Request Tickets
evidenceRequirements.description: Sample of access requests showing requested access, business need, and approval.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export or upload access request tickets from ticketing or IAM workflow system.

evidenceRequirements.title: Provisioning Logs
evidenceRequirements.description: Logs or records showing when approved access was provisioned.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export provisioning events from identity provider or application logs.

evidenceRequirements.title: Termination Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report of terminated users for the test period.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export termination report from HRIS.

evidenceRequirements.title: Deprovisioning Checklist
evidenceRequirements.description: Completed checklist showing access removal and asset return for terminated users.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload completed offboarding checklist or workflow export.

evidenceRequirements.title: Access Removal Logs
evidenceRequirements.description: Logs showing system access was disabled or removed for terminated users.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export access removal events from identity provider and in-scope systems.

evidenceRequirements.title: Patch Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report showing patch status for in-scope servers, endpoints, and infrastructure.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export patch compliance report from endpoint or infrastructure management system.

evidenceRequirements.title: Patch Exception Approvals
evidenceRequirements.description: Approved exceptions for patches that were delayed or not applied.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload exception tickets or risk acceptance records.

evidenceRequirements.title: Vulnerability Scan Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Scan report identifying vulnerabilities and severity across in-scope assets.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export report from vulnerability scanning platform.

evidenceRequirements.title: Vulnerability Remediation Tracker
evidenceRequirements.description: Tracker showing remediation status for vulnerability findings.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload remediation tracker or export tickets from issue management system.

evidenceRequirements.title: Firewall Rule Export
evidenceRequirements.description: Export of firewall, security group, or network access rules.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export rule set from firewall, cloud provider, or network security tool.

evidenceRequirements.title: Firewall Review Record
evidenceRequirements.description: Documented review of firewall rules, exceptions, and remediation actions.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload completed firewall review worksheet or approval record.

evidenceRequirements.title: Network Architecture Diagram
evidenceRequirements.description: Current diagram showing key network boundaries, ingress paths, and protected assets.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload approved network or cloud architecture diagram.

evidenceRequirements.title: Cloud Security Posture Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report of cloud configuration findings, policy violations, and remediation status.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export from CSPM tool or cloud security console.

evidenceRequirements.title: Cloud Configuration Remediation Records
evidenceRequirements.description: Records showing remediation of cloud misconfigurations or approved exceptions.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload remediation tickets or export issue records.

evidenceRequirements.title: Asset Inventory Export
evidenceRequirements.description: Current inventory of in-scope systems, applications, endpoints, cloud resources, and owners.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export from asset inventory, MDM, CMDB, or cloud provider.

evidenceRequirements.title: Asset Reconciliation Record
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that asset inventory was compared against source systems and updated.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload reconciliation worksheet or review record.

evidenceRequirements.title: Endpoint Protection Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report showing endpoint protection deployment and health status.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export report from endpoint protection or MDM platform.

evidenceRequirements.title: Malware Alert Records
evidenceRequirements.description: Records of malware or endpoint security alerts and related response actions.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export alert records from endpoint protection platform.

evidenceRequirements.title: Change Tickets
evidenceRequirements.description: Sample of production change tickets showing request, approval, testing, and deployment details.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export or upload tickets from change management or issue tracking system.

evidenceRequirements.title: Change Approval Records
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that production changes were approved before deployment.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload approval screenshots or export workflow approval history.

evidenceRequirements.title: Deployment Logs
evidenceRequirements.description: Logs showing deployment timing, release version, and deployment actor or automation.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export deployment history from CI/CD or release platform.

evidenceRequirements.title: Pull Request Review Records
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that code changes were reviewed and approved before merge.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export pull request metadata or upload reviewed pull request samples.

evidenceRequirements.title: Branch Protection Settings
evidenceRequirements.description: Configuration showing required reviews or merge protections for protected branches.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export or screenshot repository branch protection settings.

evidenceRequirements.title: Dependency Scan Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report identifying vulnerable software dependencies and severity.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export from software composition analysis or dependency scanning tool.

evidenceRequirements.title: Dependency Remediation Tickets
evidenceRequirements.description: Tickets showing remediation of vulnerable dependencies or approved risk acceptance.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export issue tracker records or upload remediation tickets.

evidenceRequirements.title: Release Test Results
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that release testing was completed before production deployment.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload test results or export CI/CD test records.

evidenceRequirements.title: Log Review Record
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that security and system logs were reviewed by assigned personnel.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload review worksheet, ticket, or exported review record.

evidenceRequirements.title: Alert Rule List
evidenceRequirements.description: List of configured security alert rules and monitored event types.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export alert rules from SIEM, logging, or monitoring platform.

evidenceRequirements.title: Alert Review Tickets
evidenceRequirements.description: Tickets or records showing security alerts were reviewed and triaged.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export alert tickets or upload review records.

evidenceRequirements.title: Log Retention Settings
evidenceRequirements.description: Configuration showing retention periods for critical logs.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export or screenshot SIEM, cloud logging, or application logging retention settings.

evidenceRequirements.title: Log Access Review
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence showing access to logs or SIEM tooling is reviewed and restricted.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload access review record or export access permissions.

evidenceRequirements.title: Incident Response Plan
evidenceRequirements.description: Approved incident response plan defining roles, escalation, communication, containment, and recovery.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload current approved incident response plan.

evidenceRequirements.title: Tabletop Exercise Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report documenting incident response tabletop scenario, participants, results, and action items.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload tabletop exercise report and participant list.

evidenceRequirements.title: Incident Tickets
evidenceRequirements.description: Records of security incidents including timeline, severity, containment, remediation, and closure.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export or upload incident tickets from incident management system.

evidenceRequirements.title: Post-Incident Review
evidenceRequirements.description: Documented review of significant incidents, root cause, lessons learned, and corrective actions.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload post-incident review document or closure report.

evidenceRequirements.title: Corrective Action Tracker
evidenceRequirements.description: Tracker showing ownership, due dates, and closure of corrective actions from incidents or deficiencies.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload tracker or export issue records.

evidenceRequirements.title: Vendor Inventory
evidenceRequirements.description: Inventory of vendors, services provided, risk ratings, and data or system access.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export from vendor management system or upload vendor register.

evidenceRequirements.title: Vendor Risk Assessment
evidenceRequirements.description: Assessment of vendor security and compliance risk before onboarding or during periodic review.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload completed vendor risk assessment or questionnaire.

evidenceRequirements.title: Vendor SOC Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Vendor assurance report, such as SOC 2 report, ISO certificate, or equivalent security attestation.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload vendor assurance report obtained during due diligence or annual review.

evidenceRequirements.title: Vendor Access Export
evidenceRequirements.description: Export of vendor accounts or vendor-managed access to systems and data.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export accounts filtered by vendor or external user status from identity provider and applications.

evidenceRequirements.title: Backup Job Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report showing backup job success, failure, and coverage for in-scope systems.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export from backup platform or infrastructure tooling.

evidenceRequirements.title: Backup Failure Remediation
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence showing failed backup jobs were investigated and remediated.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload backup failure tickets or remediation records.

evidenceRequirements.title: Backup Restore Test Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that selected backups were restored and validated successfully.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload restore test report with validation results.

evidenceRequirements.title: Disaster Recovery Test Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that disaster recovery procedures were tested against recovery objectives.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload disaster recovery exercise or test report.

evidenceRequirements.title: Recovery Objectives
evidenceRequirements.description: Defined recovery time objectives and recovery point objectives for critical systems.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload disaster recovery plan section or recovery objective matrix.

evidenceRequirements.title: Security Awareness Training Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report showing completion of required security awareness training.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export completion report from learning management system.

evidenceRequirements.title: Security Awareness Training Content
evidenceRequirements.description: Training material used for employee security awareness education.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload training deck, course outline, or training module export.

evidenceRequirements.title: Policy Acknowledgement Report
evidenceRequirements.description: Report showing employee acknowledgement of required policies.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export acknowledgement report from HRIS, LMS, or policy management tool.

evidenceRequirements.title: Policy Distribution Record
evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence that required policies were distributed or made available to employees.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload communication record, policy portal export, or distribution log.

evidenceRequirements.title: Encryption Configuration
evidenceRequirements.description: Configuration showing encryption for sensitive data at rest or in transit.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Export or screenshot encryption settings from cloud, database, storage, or application systems.

evidenceRequirements.title: Data Flow Documentation
evidenceRequirements.description: Documentation showing how sensitive data is stored, processed, transmitted, and protected.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload data flow diagram or system data flow documentation.

evidenceRequirements.title: Data Retention Schedule
evidenceRequirements.description: Approved retention schedule defining retention periods for in-scope data types.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload data retention schedule or policy appendix.

evidenceRequirements.title: Deletion and Archival Records
evidenceRequirements.description: Records showing data was deleted, archived, or retained according to requirements.
evidenceRequirements.collectionMethod: Upload deletion logs, archival reports, or ticket records.
